target.title: test(core): align changed gate type fixtures
target.body:
## Summary

Rebased the changed-gate unblocker onto current `origin/main` and pruned it down to the remaining test-fixture type fixes not already present on main.

- Remove a stale legacy OAuth sidecar import from the auth-profile save tests.
- Accept readonly bundled channel ids in the bundled channel shape guard test.
- Type the encoded `spawnSync` result in the plugin SDK channel-entry contract test.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/auth-profiles.store.save.test.ts src/channels/plugins/bundled.shape-guard.test.ts src/plugin-sdk/channel-entry-contract.test.ts` passed: 3 shards, 57 tests, 10.89s.
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/agents/auth-profiles.store.save.test.ts src/channels/plugins/bundled.shape-guard.test.ts src/plugin-sdk/channel-entry-contract.test.ts` passed.
- `git diff --check` passed.
- AWS Crabbox `pnpm check:changed` on current main `096bd13962c` is blocked before this branch's tests by unrelated current-main core production type errors: run `run_4585fd8a05d3`, lease `cbx_e38c00acc044` / `golden-lobster`, provider `aws`.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Current changed-gate core test type fixtures are aligned with stricter type surfaces so schema-runtime PR proof can proceed once current-main production type drift is resolved.

Real environment tested: Local linked worktree via repo Vitest/format wrappers; remote AWS Crabbox changed gate.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: See Verification above.

Evidence after fix: Focused test files pass locally after rebasing onto current main. The latest remote gate reaches `typecheck core` and fails on unrelated current-main production files outside this PR's diff.

Observed result after fix: The remaining branch diff is 3 test files, +4/-5; overlapping auth/status/TTS/Codex/gateway lint cleanup that landed on main was dropped during rebase.

What was not tested: A fully green `pnpm check:changed` on this branch is currently blocked by unrelated current-main core production type errors listed in `run_4585fd8a05d3`.
